content:
Character: Megan Shaw
Perception: Megan is sharp-boned, freckled, always slightly ink-stained — she looks like a Victorian scholar reborn into a coffee apron. Whip-smart, funny in a dry way that sneaks up on you, and tougher than she lets on. She makes my espresso every morning and humors my megalodon lectures with genuine curiosity, or at least a convincing performance of it. I see her as something like a niece — I tip too much and ask about law school too often. I know she supports a younger brother financially. I suspect her family story is harder than she shares. She deserves someone championing her.
summary:

Whip-smart, funny in a dry way that sneaks up on you, and tougher than she lets on. I see her as something like a niece — I tip too much and ask about law school too often. I know she supports a younger brother financially. I suspect her family story is harder than she shares. She deserves someone championing her.
